summary: Run an automated scan quickly and safely with ZAP Quick Start.
examples: Scan a staging site to validate headers and low-risk findings.
Compare results between traditional and AJAX spider runs.
diagrams: Quick Start flow: URL -> Spider -> Active Scan -> Alerts

content:
## Overview
Run an automated scan quickly and safely with ZAP Quick Start.

### Why it matters
This guide turns a ZAP feature into a repeatable workflow you can share across teams.

### Preparation
- Confirm scope and permissions.
- Ensure required add-ons are installed.
- Decide how you will capture evidence.
title: Quick Start Automated Scan (Workflow 26)
steps: Open the Quick Start tab and choose Automated Scan.
Enter the target URL and verify you have permission.
Pick traditional spider or AJAX spider based on the app.
Launch the scan and monitor progress in the toolbar.
Review alerts and capture evidence for follow-up.
